title: lithocarpus stipitatus
intro: Lithocarpus stipitatus, also known as the California Nut or California Hazelnut, is a deciduous tree native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, and is used to treat pain, reduce inflammation, and relieve fever. The health benefits of Lithocarpus stipitatus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus stipitatus can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
